documentation.text:
@dev Simple role-based access control without importing OpenZeppelin.
      For production you should replace this with OZ's AccessControl.

@dev Lifecycle states for a piece of evidence.
      Transitions are restricted — not every jump is valid.
  Collected → Submitted → UnderReview → Transferred
                                      ↘ Archived
                                      ↘ Rejected
@dev Supported evidence types for classification.
@dev A single entry in the chain-of-custody audit trail.
@dev Registered system user (off-chain DB mirrors this for performance).
@dev Pending multi-signature transfer request for sensitive evidence.

@notice Return the complete chain-of-custody audit trail.
 @dev    The array is ordered from oldest to newest — index 0 = registration.
@notice Get all evidence IDs associated with a case.
@notice Read the on-chain details of a registered officer.

@notice Check whether a file hash has already been registered.
         Useful off-chain to detect duplicate submissions.
@notice Get the current status of an evidence item (public for court use).
@notice Retrieve a pending transfer request by its ID.
@notice Get who has verified a specific evidence item.
@notice Return the role assigned to any wallet address.
@notice Return total number of evidence records registered.

@notice Admins can promote evidence to sensitive or downgrade it.
 @dev    Only affects future transfers — existing transfer requests are unaffected.

Sensitive evidence must use the multi-sig flow (requestTransfer / approveTransfer).","params":{"evidenceId":"The evidence to transfer.","reasonHash":"keccak256(reason for transfer).","toOfficer":"Address of the receiving investigator."}},"transferSuperAdmin(address)":{"details":"The old superAdmin loses all elevated permissions."},"updateEvidenceStatus(bytes32,uint8,bytes32)":{"details":"Valid transitions are enforced \u2014 you cannot go backwards arbitrarily. They can no longer interact with the system.         Their historical records remain intact and immutable."},"executeTransfer(bytes32)":{"notice":"Execute a transfer request that has reached the required approval count."},"forceArchive(bytes32,bytes32)":{"notice":"Force-archive evidence without going through normal status transitions.         Use only in emergency or court-order scenarios."},"getEvidenceByCase(bytes32)":{"notice":"Get all evidence IDs associated with a case."},"getEvidenceDetails(bytes32)":{"notice":"Retrieve the full on-chain record for a piece of evidence."},"getEvidenceHistory(bytes32)":{"notice":"Return the complete chain-of-custody audit trail."},"getEvidenceStatus(bytes32)":{"notice":"Get the current status of an evidence item (public for court use)."},"getOfficerDetails(address)":{"notice":"Read the on-chain details of a registered officer."},"getRoleOf(address)":{"notice":"Return the role assigned to any wallet address."},"getTransferRequest(bytes32)":{"notice":"Retrieve a pending transfer request by its ID."},"getVerificationLog(bytes32)":{"notice":"Get who has verified a specific evidence item."},"isFileHashRegistered(bytes32)":{"notice":"Check whether a file hash has already been registered.
